description: This pipeline processes images through a series of filtering, thresholding, and measurement steps to extract and analyze features such as cell membranes, masks, and distances between objects, ultimately generating results tables and exporting images in various formats, while also performing calibration and formatting operations to prepare the data for further analysis or storage.

bd8cf641-b46f-4756-8a53-c72ecf83d5d2.name: iji-export-image-v2
bd8cf641-b46f-4756-8a53-c72ecf83d5d2.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

cf4755cd-fd2e-467f-83c6-c3f6e22db44c.name: ij3d-filter-roi3d-by-statistics
cf4755cd-fd2e-467f-83c6-c3f6e22db44c.description:
Filters the 3D ROI list elements via statistics.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

73acc40e-8da6-4250-a725-440382bc8d39.name: ij3d-measure-roi3d
73acc40e-8da6-4250-a725-440382bc8d39.description:
Generates a results table containing 3D ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, NaN is returned.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f38d555e-c87e-42c5-9ca1-1ad2d51f6938.name: ij3d-measure-roi3d
f38d555e-c87e-42c5-9ca1-1ad2d51f6938.description:
Generates a results table containing 3D ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, NaN is returned.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

ebf99ef7-50e8-40cb-84ec-2dc8602d2933.name: ij1-generate-zero-image
ebf99ef7-50e8-40cb-84ec-2dc8602d2933.description: Creates a new image that is black.

0dcb7500-ba0e-4eca-9428-237901834ea6.name: ij1-blur-median2d
0dcb7500-ba0e-4eca-9428-237901834ea6.description: Applies a median filter. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

ceb9ac4e-0eba-4e32-acdc-179417756f0f.name: ij1-blur-median2d
ceb9ac4e-0eba-4e32-acdc-179417756f0f.description: Applies a median filter. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

5bd2d21c-05a2-4476-a803-89e0f740b4f1.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
5bd2d21c-05a2-4476-a803-89e0f740b4f1.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

8398880e-fa5b-4473-8bba-6006df02eacf.name: ij3d-roi-convert-to-rgb
8398880e-fa5b-4473-8bba-6006df02eacf.description:
Converts 3D ROI lists to a label image. Depending on the number of objects, an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit label image is generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

5c34a56a-0eed-4bce-b864-3e2544f6ea32.name: ij3d-roi-change-properties
5c34a56a-0eed-4bce-b864-3e2544f6ea32.description: Sets the properties of all 3D ROI

fcda7d23-19b6-4378-8c8e-342dfc05ddca.name: ij3d-filter-roi3d-by-statistics
fcda7d23-19b6-4378-8c8e-342dfc05ddca.description:
Filters the 3D ROI list elements via statistics.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

bc04081f-9a72-4f2f-a67b-72487a38d027.name: cpython-script-iterating
bc04081f-9a72-4f2f-a67b-72487a38d027.description:
Runs a Python script that iterates through each iteration step in the input slots. This node uses an existing dedicated Python interpreter that must be set up in the application settings.

To learn more about the JIPipe Python API, visit https://jipipe.hki-jena.de/apidocs/python-current/index.html

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

2221e622-981a-40b7-b574-a1593dba2745.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
2221e622-981a-40b7-b574-a1593dba2745.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

be88abdc-816d-4297-ab35-07d168377c0b.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
be88abdc-816d-4297-ab35-07d168377c0b.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

4d2895c7-fbc3-4260-87d8-03d2c8d7b1f2.name: ij1-color-blend-images
4d2895c7-fbc3-4260-87d8-03d2c8d7b1f2.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

09ca6e22-bb4b-4a44-b3b4-f11d315f8a48.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
09ca6e22-bb4b-4a44-b3b4-f11d315f8a48.description:

5bc7b811-0217-4d99-9a7e-697d4a18844b.name: ij1-color-blend-images

bda19bde-5bac-4804-8b64-96b2ad809936.name: cpython-script-iterating
bda19bde-5bac-4804-8b64-96b2ad809936.description:

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

a0dce42f-035b-475e-8121-7d56c2ff1993.name: ij1-binary-connected-component-labeling-3d
a0dce42f-035b-475e-8121-7d56c2ff1993.description: Applies a connected components labeling on a mask. Each connected component is assigned a unique value in the output label image. If the image is non-binary, the connected components are generated per-input value. If 3D data is supplied, the connected components are extracted in 3D.

c6b94702-a848-4bf1-a08d-65ddd06189c1.name: ij3d-labels-to-roi
c6b94702-a848-4bf1-a08d-65ddd06189c1.description: Converts a label image into 3D ROI
